name: Create eco news with valid data -- @1.3
fullName: Create Eco News: Create eco news with valid data

steps.name: And Get Create Eco News client
When I send POST request to create eco news with data:

parameters.name: files
parameters.value: {'image': ('image.jpg', <_io.BufferedReader name='/tmp/tmpxg34phx4.jpg'>, 'image/jpeg'), 'addEcoNewsDtoRequest': (None, '{"source": "https://example.net", "shortInfo": "Upcoming environmental event", "tags": ["events"], "title": "Upcoming environmental event", "text": "Full article text here", "titleTranslation": {"content": "Environmental Event", "languageCode": "en"}, "textTranslation": {"content": "Event details and registration info", "languageCode": "en"}}', 'application/json')}

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {'source': 'https://example.net', 'shortInfo': 'Upcoming environmental event', 'tags': ['events'], 'title': 'Upcoming environmental event', 'text': 'Full article text here', 'titleTranslation': {'content': 'Environmental Event', 'languageCode': 'en'}, 'textTranslation': {'content': 'Event details and registration info', 'languageCode': 'en'}}

steps.name: Then the response status code should be 201

parameters.name: data
